rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Eaton Corporation, As Sii To Cutler-Hammer, Inc.'S Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Written Discovery, Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 22, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Eaton Corp.¿s further discovery responses, motion to deem requests for admission admitted and request for sanctions is off calendar. This motion was heard and granted on December 2, 2010. = (220/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: SALVADORE PENA et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 22, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Alta Building Material Co.¿s motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and requests for production and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to December 29, 2010 to provide the parties an opportunity to meet and confer regarding providing verified responses. If all issues are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on December 28 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on December 29. = (220/MJM)
